examples: Resorcin diepoxide ether adhesive is a high strength adhesive curing at room temperature.
Resorcin biodegradation was studied by acclimated anaerobic sludge with sucrose, glucose, butyrate and ethanol as co-metabolism substrates in ASBR reactor.
PF resin is modified by use of urea and resorcin to prepare a kind of mid-temperature water-soluble resin, which is suitable for "hot-hot process" in bamboo plywood production.
